conflicts.description: The file is a large legacy static dictionary. Rewriting all categories at once would create a broad review surface and make regressions hard to isolate.
conflicts.strategy: Pilot-first: add or adapt only the three MVP pilot categories and keep the legacy BLIND_BOXES runtime view intact.
conflicts.impact: Implementation becomes smaller and easier to verify; full 20-category content migration is deferred.

conflicts.description: Runtime input labels, extraction buckets and history keys are coupled to large/medium/small/hanging.
conflicts.strategy: Introduce compatibility mapping or generated legacy view before changing runtime UI behavior; keep category_info and input parser stable.
conflicts.impact: Users keep current comma syntax and history behavior while new content model can be tested.

conflicts.description: State words include transparent/reflection wording that conflicts with the new risk isolation rules.
conflicts.strategy: Treat risky state handling as a validation/test concern in MVP; do not relax default blind-box output rules.
conflicts.impact: Prevents accidental reintroduction of rejected visual qualities.

conflicts.description: Recent brainstorm/spec artifacts and documentation updates are intentionally uncommitted.
conflicts.strategy: Plan tasks must explicitly preserve existing workflow/spec artifacts and sync docs only in implementation tasks that touch behavior or data.
conflicts.impact: Avoids overwriting planning context while satisfying repository doc-sync rules.

summary: Proceed with phased implementation: schema and mapping first, pilot data second, validation third, documentation last. Keep runtime compatibility as a hard constraint.
